p2p_enrichment.notes: Added CI/CD repo_tests as pass_to_pass gates. CI commands found and added: 1) cargo check -p turbo-persistence, 2) cargo check -p turbo-tasks-backend, 3) cargo fmt -- --check, 4) cargo clippy -p turbo-persistence -- -D warnings, 5) cargo clippy -p turbo-tasks-backend -- -D warnings, 6) cargo test -p turbo-persistence --lib (NEW), 7) cargo test -p turbo-tasks-backend (NEW). Fixed existing repo_tests to install rustup when cargo is not available (Docker image doesn't include Rust). All 7 repo_tests now pass. Modified files: turbopack/crates/turbo-persistence/src/db.rs, turbopack/crates/turbo-tasks-backend/src/backend/mod.rs. Tests cover compilation, formatting, linting, and unit tests for both modified crates.
